```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/shared/abcjs-audio.css">

<style>
#songs-root {
  --pr:#2780e3; --br:#dee2e6; --bl:#e9ecef; --mu:#6c757d;
  --in:#212529; --sf:#fff; --bs:#f8f9fa; --cue:#b7005a;
  max-width:900px; margin:0 auto 2rem;
  font-family:var(--bs-font-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif); color:var(--in);
}
#songs-root .sq-card {
  background:var(--sf); border:1px solid var(--br); border-radius:.5rem;
  padding:1rem 1.15rem; margin:0 0 1rem; box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
}
#songs-root .sq-row { display:flex; gap:.5rem .75rem; align-items:flex-end; flex-wrap:wrap; }
#songs-root .sq-group { display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
#songs-root .sq-label {
  font-size:.78rem; color:var(--mu); font-weight:600;
  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.03em; margin-bottom:.25rem;
}
#songs-root h2 {
  font-size:.78rem; color:var(--mu); font-weight:700;
  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.04em; margin:0 0 .75rem;
}
#songs-root select {
  padding:.35rem .6rem; font-size:.9rem; border:1px solid #ced4da;
  border-radius:.375rem; background:var(--sf); color:var(--in); height:auto;
}
#songs-root .sq-btn {
  padding:.35rem .7rem; font-size:.9rem; border:1px solid #ced4da;
  border-radius:.375rem; background:var(--sf); color:var(--in);
  cursor:pointer; line-height:1.5; white-space:nowrap;
}
#songs-root .sq-btn:disabled { opacity:.5; cursor:not-allowed; }
#songs-root .sq-paper {
  background:var(--sf); border:1px solid var(--bl); border-radius:.375rem;
  padding:.4rem .5rem; min-height:56px; margin-bottom:.5rem;
}
#songs-root .sq-paper svg { width:100% !important; height:auto !important; display:block; }
#songs-root textarea {
  display:block; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; min-height:70px;
  padding:.4rem .5rem; font-family:monospace; font-size:.82rem;
  border:1px solid var(--br); border-radius:.375rem;
  background:var(--bs); color:var(--in); resize:vertical; margin-bottom:.5rem;
}
#songs-root textarea[readonly] { background:#f0f0f0; color:var(--mu); }
#songs-root .cue-note {
  min-height:1.3em; color:var(--cue); font-style:italic;
  font-size:.88rem; margin-bottom:.5rem;
}
#songs-root .expansion-picker {
  display:none; border:1px solid #9ec5fe; background:#e7f1ff;
  border-radius:.375rem; padding:.75rem 1rem; margin-bottom:.75rem;
}
#songs-root .expansion-picker.visible { display:block; }
#songs-root .expansion-picker p { margin:0 0 .5rem; font-size:.88rem; }
#songs-root .expansion-options { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-top:.5rem; }
#songs-root .expansion-option {
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:4px;
}
#songs-root .expansion-key { font-weight:700; font-size:.82rem; color:var(--mu); }
#songs-root .cell-criteria {
  display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:4px 14px; margin-bottom:.6rem; font-size:.9rem;
}
#songs-root .cell-criteria label {
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-weight:normal; color:var(--in);
}
#songs-root .cell-criteria input[type=checkbox] { width:auto; margin:0; }
#songs-root .cell-bank { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-end; gap:6px; margin-top:4px; }
#songs-root .cell-buttons { display:contents; }
#songs-root .cell-wrapper { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; }
#songs-root .cell-number { font-size:11px; color:var(--mu); margin-bottom:2px; margin-left:4px; }
#songs-root .cell-btn {
  background:var(--sf) !important; border:1px solid #ced4da !important;
  border-radius:.375rem !important; cursor:pointer !important;
  padding:2px !important; box-sizing:content-box !important;
  position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .12s, box-shadow .12s;
}
#songs-root .cell-btn:hover {
  border-color:var(--pr) !important; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(39,128,227,.15) !important;
}
#songs-root .cell-preview { pointer-events:none; }
#songs-root .cell-preview svg { display:block; }
/* Suppress zero-height staff in rhythm cell buttons only */
#songs-root #rhythm-cell-buttons .abcjs-staff,
#songs-root #cued-rhythm-paper .abcjs-staff { display:none; }
</style>

<script>
	/* ------- Rhythm side: MLT cell system (from rhythm-sequences) ------- */
	const FAMILIES_s = {
		duple: { defaultL: "1/4", microbeatCount: 2, unitsPerMacrobeat: 1 },
		triple: { defaultL: "1/8", microbeatCount: 3, unitsPerMacrobeat: 3 }
	};
	const SOURCE_COLLECTIONS_s = {
		duple: ["Duple-M-m-2-4", "Duple-M-m-D-2/4", "Duple, M-m-D-E-2/4", "Duple, M-m-R-2/4", "Duple, M-m-D-E-R-U-2/4"],
		triple: ["Triple-M-m-6/8", "Triple-M-m-D-6/8", "Triple-M-m-D-E-6/8"]
	};
	const cellPoolCache_s = {};

	function getActiveFamily_s() {
		return document.getElementById("rhythm-family-selector").value;
	}

	function inferCriteriaFromCollectionName_s(name) {
		const tokens = name.split(/[-,]/).map(function(t) { return t.trim(); });
		return {
			macrobeat: true, microbeat: true,
			division: tokens.indexOf("D") !== -1,
			elongation: tokens.indexOf("E") !== -1,
			rest: tokens.indexOf("R") !== -1
		};
	}

	function getSelectedCriteria_s() {
		return {
			macrobeat: document.getElementById("crit-macrobeat").checked,
			microbeat: document.getElementById("crit-microbeat").checked,
			division: document.getElementById("crit-division").checked,
			elongation: document.getElementById("crit-elongation").checked,
			rest: document.getElementById("crit-rest").checked
		};
	}

	function tokenLenFraction_s(mod) {
		if (!mod) return [1, 1];
		const match = /^(\d*)(\/*)(\d*)$/.exec(mod);
		const numerator = match[1] ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : 1;
		let denominator;
		if (match[2]) denominator = match[3] ? parseInt(match[3], 10) : Math.pow(2, match[2].length);
		else denominator = 1;
		return [numerator, denominator];
	}

	function parseGroupTokens_s(group) {
		const tokens = [];
		let i = 0;
		let pendingMultiplier = 1;
		let hasRest = false;
		let hasElongationMark = false;
		while (i < group.length) {
			const ch = group[i];
			if (ch === "B" || ch === "z") {
				if (ch === "z") hasRest = true;
				let j = i + 1;
				let mod = "";
				while (j < group.length && /[\d/]/.test(group[j])) { mod += group[j]; j++; }
				let tie = false;
				if (group[j] === "-") { tie = true; j++; }
				const lenFraction = tokenLenFraction_s(mod);
				let duration = (lenFraction[0] / lenFraction[1]) * pendingMultiplier;
				pendingMultiplier = 1;
				if (group[j] === ">") { duration *= 1.5; pendingMultiplier = 0.5; hasElongationMark = true; j++; }
				else if (group[j] === "<") { duration *= 0.5; pendingMultiplier = 1.5; hasElongationMark = true; j++; }
				tokens.push({ duration: duration, tie: tie });
				i = j;
			} else { i++; }
		}
		return { tokens: tokens, hasRest: hasRest, hasElongationMark: hasElongationMark };
	}

	const FORCE_DIV_ELO_s = new Set(["B/>B/", "B/<B/", "B//B/B//"]);

	function classifyCell_s(group, family) {
		const familyInfo = FAMILIES_s[family];
		const parsed = parseGroupTokens_s(group);
		if (parsed.tokens.length === 0) return null;
		if (parsed.tokens[parsed.tokens.length - 1].tie) return null;
		const total = parsed.tokens.reduce(function(sum, t) { return sum + t.duration; }, 0);
		if (Math.abs(total - familyInfo.unitsPerMacrobeat) > 1e-9) return null;
		const microbeatDuration = familyInfo.unitsPerMacrobeat / familyInfo.microbeatCount;
		const hasDivision = parsed.tokens.some(function(t) { return t.duration < microbeatDuration - 1e-9; });
		const isMacrobeat = parsed.tokens.length === 1 && !parsed.hasRest && !parsed.hasElongationMark;
		const isMicrobeat = !isMacrobeat && !parsed.hasRest && !parsed.hasElongationMark && !hasDivision &&
			parsed.tokens.length === familyInfo.microbeatCount &&
			parsed.tokens.every(function(t) { return Math.abs(t.duration - microbeatDuration) < 1e-9; });
		const required = {};
		if (isMacrobeat) required.macrobeat = true;
		else if (isMicrobeat) required.microbeat = true;
		else {
			if (hasDivision) required.division = true;
			if (parsed.hasElongationMark) required.elongation = true;
			if (parsed.hasRest) required.rest = true;
		}
		if (FORCE_DIV_ELO_s.has(group)) return { required: { division: true, elongation: true } };
		return { required: required };
	}

	function extractCellsFromCollection_s(collectionKey, family) {
		const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(rhythmPatternObject[collectionKey]);
		const found = [];
		tuneBook.tunes.forEach(function(tune) {
			const lines = tune.abc.split("\n");
			let bodyLine = "";
			lines.forEach(function(line) {
				if (/^[A-Za-z]:/.test(line)) return;
				if (line.trim() === "") return;
				bodyLine = line;
			});
			if (!bodyLine) return;
			bodyLine.split("|").forEach(function(bar) {
				bar.trim().split(/\s+/).forEach(function(group) {
					if (group === "") return;
					const classified = classifyCell_s(group, family);
					if (classified) found.push({ abc: group, required: classified.required });
				});
			});
		});
		return found;
	}

	const LONG_ELO_CELLS_s = {
		duple: [
			{ abc: "B2", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B3 B", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B B3", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B4", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B> B", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B< B", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B/ B B/", required: { elongation: true } },
			{ abc: "B//B/B/B/B//", required: { division: true, elongation: true } }
		],
		triple: [{ abc: "B6", required: { elongation: true } }]
	};

	function getLongEloCells_s(family) {
		return LONG_ELO_CELLS_s[family].map(function(entry) {
			const parsed = parseGroupTokens_s(entry.abc);
			const totalLUnits = parsed.tokens.reduce(function(sum, t) { return sum + t.duration; }, 0);
			return { abc: entry.abc, required: entry.required, totalLUnits: totalLUnits };
		});
	}

	function getCellPool_s(family) {
		if (cellPoolCache_s[family]) return cellPoolCache_s[family];
		const seen = new Set();
		const pool = [];
		SOURCE_COLLECTIONS_s[family].forEach(function(collectionKey) {
			extractCellsFromCollection_s(collectionKey, family).forEach(function(cell) {
				if (seen.has(cell.abc)) return;
				seen.add(cell.abc);
				pool.push(cell);
			});
		});
		getLongEloCells_s(family).forEach(function(cell) {
			if (seen.has(cell.abc)) return;
			seen.add(cell.abc);
			pool.push(cell);
		});
		cellPoolCache_s[family] = pool;
		return pool;
	}

	function parseFraction_s(str, fallback) {
		const match = (str || "").match(/(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/);
		return match ? parseInt(match[1]) / parseInt(match[2]) : fallback;
	}

	function getMeterInfo_s() {
		const familyInfo = FAMILIES_s[getActiveFamily_s()];
		const Lfraction = parseFraction_s(familyInfo.defaultL, 0.25);
		const timeSignature = document.getElementById("time-signature-selector").value;
		const barCapacity = parseFraction_s(timeSignature, 1) * 4;
		return { Lfraction: Lfraction, barCapacity: barCapacity, timeSignature: timeSignature, familyInfo: familyInfo };
	}

	function getFilteredCells_s(family, criteria) {
		const meter = getMeterInfo_s();
		return getCellPool_s(family).filter(function(cell) {
			if (!Object.keys(cell.required).every(function(need) { return criteria[need]; })) return false;
			if (cell.totalLUnits !== undefined && cell.totalLUnits * meter.Lfraction * 4 > meter.barCapacity + 1e-9) return false;
			return true;
		});
	}

	function tokenizeRhythmCell_s(cell) {
		const segments = [];
		let i = 0;
		let pendingMultiplier = 1;
		while (i < cell.length) {
			const ch = cell[i];
			if (ch === "B" || ch === "z") {
				let j = i + 1;
				let suffix = "";
				while (j < cell.length && /[\d/]/.test(cell[j])) { suffix += cell[j]; j++; }
				let tie = "";
				if (cell[j] === "-") { tie = "-"; j++; }
				const lenFraction = tokenLenFraction_s(suffix);
				let duration = (lenFraction[0] / lenFraction[1]) * pendingMultiplier;
				pendingMultiplier = 1;
				let dotMark = "";
				if (cell[j] === ">") { duration *= 1.5; pendingMultiplier = 0.5; dotMark = ">"; j++; }
				else if (cell[j] === "<") { duration *= 0.5; pendingMultiplier = 1.5; dotMark = "<"; j++; }
				segments.push({ type: ch === "B" ? "note" : "rest", suffix: suffix, tie: tie, dotMark: dotMark, duration: duration });
				i = j;
			} else { i++; }
		}
		return segments;
	}

	function hitCount_s(cell) {
		return tokenizeRhythmCell_s(cell).filter(function(s) { return s.type === "note"; }).length;
	}

	function cellQuarters_s(cellAbc, Lfraction) {
		return tokenizeRhythmCell_s(cellAbc).reduce(function(sum, seg) { return sum + seg.duration * Lfraction * 4; }, 0);
	}

	function lUnitsToSuffix_s(lUnits) {
		const rounded = Math.round(lUnits);
		return rounded === 1 ? "" : String(rounded);
	}

	function resolvedPhrases_s() {
		const open = currentOpenPhrase_s();
		return phrases_s.filter(function(p) { return p !== open; });
	}

	function pickupOffsetQuarters_s(Lfraction, barCapacity) {
		const total = resolvedPhrases_s().reduce(function(sum, p) {
			return sum + p.rhythmCells.reduce(function(s, rc) { return s + cellQuarters_s(rc.abc, Lfraction); }, 0);
		}, 0);
		return total % barCapacity;
	}

	function phraseRhythmQuartersSoFar_s(phrase, Lfraction) {
		return phrase.rhythmCells.reduce(function(sum, rc) { return sum + cellQuarters_s(rc.abc, Lfraction); }, 0);
	}

	function renderBarredWords_s(rhythmCells, pitches, startOffsetQuarters, Lfraction, barCapacity) {
		const words = [];
		let wordBuffer = "";
		let running = startOffsetQuarters;
		let p = 0;

		function flushWord() { if (wordBuffer) { words.push(wordBuffer); wordBuffer = ""; } }

		rhythmCells.forEach(function(rc) {
			tokenizeRhythmCell_s(rc.abc).forEach(function(seg) {
				const segQuarters = seg.duration * Lfraction * 4;
				const remaining = barCapacity - running;

				if (seg.type === "note" && !seg.tie && segQuarters > remaining + 1e-9 && remaining > 1e-9) {
					const pitch = pitches ? pitches[p++] : "B";
					const firstLUnits = remaining / (Lfraction * 4);
					const restLUnits = seg.duration - firstLUnits;
					wordBuffer += pitch + lUnitsToSuffix_s(firstLUnits) + "-";
					flushWord();
					words.push("|");
					wordBuffer += pitch + lUnitsToSuffix_s(restLUnits);
					running = restLUnits * Lfraction * 4;
					return;
				}

				const pitch = seg.type === "note" ? (pitches ? pitches[p++] : "B") : "z";
				wordBuffer += pitch + seg.suffix + seg.tie + seg.dotMark;
				running += segQuarters;
				if (running >= barCapacity - 1e-9) {
					flushWord();
					words.push("|");
					running = 0;
				}
			});
			flushWord();
		});
		flushWord();
		return words;
	}

	function splitSegmentsAt_s(segments, splitAt) {
		if (splitAt > 0 && splitAt < segments.length && segments[splitAt - 1].dotMark) splitAt += 1;
		const firstSegs = segments.slice(0, splitAt);
		const restSegs = segments.slice(splitAt);
		function toAbc(segs) {
			return segs.map(function(seg) { return (seg.type === "note" ? "B" : "z") + seg.suffix + seg.tie + seg.dotMark; }).join("");
		}
		function toHits(segs) { return segs.filter(function(s) { return s.type === "note"; }).length; }
		return {
			first: firstSegs.length ? { abc: toAbc(firstSegs), hits: toHits(firstSegs) } : null,
			rest: restSegs.length ? { abc: toAbc(restSegs), hits: toHits(restSegs) } : null
		};
	}

	function splitRhythmCellByHits_s(cellAbc, hitsToKeep) {
		const segments = tokenizeRhythmCell_s(cellAbc);
		if (hitsToKeep <= 0) return splitSegmentsAt_s(segments, 0);
		let seen = 0, splitAt = segments.length;
		for (let i = 0; i < segments.length; i++) {
			if (segments[i].type === "note") {
				seen++;
				if (seen === hitsToKeep) { splitAt = i + 1; break; }
			}
		}
		return splitSegmentsAt_s(segments, splitAt);
	}

	function trimRhythmCellsToHits_s(rhythmCells, hitsToKeep) {
		const kept = [];
		const leftover = [];
		let remaining = hitsToKeep;
		rhythmCells.forEach(function(rc) {
			if (remaining <= 0) { leftover.push(rc); return; }
			if (rc.hits <= remaining) { kept.push(rc); remaining -= rc.hits; }
			else {
				const split = splitRhythmCellByHits_s(rc.abc, remaining);
				if (split.first) kept.push(split.first);
				if (split.rest) leftover.push(split.rest);
				remaining = 0;
			}
		});
		return { kept: kept, leftover: leftover };
	}

	function splitTonalCellByNotes_s(cellAbc, notesToKeep) {
		const chordMatch = cellAbc.match(/^"[^"]*"\s*/);
		const chordPrefix = chordMatch ? chordMatch[0] : "";
		const tokens = cellAbc.slice(chordPrefix.length).trim().split(/\s+/).filter(function(t) { return t !== ""; });
		const keep = Math.max(0, notesToKeep);
		const firstTokens = tokens.slice(0, keep);
		const restTokens = tokens.slice(keep);
		function toPitches(toks) { return toks.map(function(t) { return t.replace(/0$/, ""); }); }
		return {
			first: firstTokens.length ? { abc: chordPrefix + firstTokens.join(" "), pitches: toPitches(firstTokens) } : null,
			rest: restTokens.length ? { abc: restTokens.join(" "), pitches: toPitches(restTokens) } : null
		};
	}

	/* ------- Tonal side ------- */
	function indexToLetter_s(i) { return String.fromCharCode(65 + i); }

	function extractV1Notes_s(tuneAbc, stripChords) {
		let v1Line = "";
		tuneAbc.split("\n").forEach(function(line) {
			if (line.indexOf("[V: V1]") !== -1) v1Line = line;
		});
		v1Line = v1Line.replace("[V: V1]", "").trim();
		if (stripChords) v1Line = v1Line.replace(/"[^"]*"/g, "").trim();
		return v1Line;
	}

	function getCollectionKeyField_s(collectionName) {
		const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(patternObject[collectionName]);
		const match = tuneBook.tunes[0].abc.match(/^K:\s*(.+)$/m);
		return match ? match[1].trim() : "C";
	}

	function tokenizePitches_s(tonalAbc) {
		return tonalAbc.replace(/"[^"]*"/g, "").trim().split(/\s+/).filter(function(t) { return t !== ""; })
			.map(function(t) { return t.replace(/0$/, ""); });
	}

	function expandPitches_s(pitches, targetCount, strategy) {
		const n = pitches.length;
		if (n === targetCount) return pitches.slice();
		if (n === 0 || n > targetCount) return null;
		const base = Math.floor(targetCount / n);
		const remainder = targetCount - base * n;
		const counts = new Array(n).fill(base);
		if (strategy === "front") counts[0] += remainder;
		else if (strategy === "back") counts[n - 1] += remainder;
		else { for (let k = 0; k < remainder; k++) counts[k] += 1; }
		const result = [];
		for (let idx = 0; idx < n; idx++) {
			for (let c = 0; c < counts[idx]; c++) result.push(pitches[idx]);
		}
		return result;
	}

	function getStaffCenter_s(svg, bbox) {
		const lines = Array.from(svg.querySelectorAll("path")).map(function(p) { return p.getBBox(); })
			.filter(function(b) { return b.height < 2 && b.width > bbox.width * 0.5; });
		if (lines.length === 0) return bbox.y + bbox.height / 2;
		const top = Math.min.apply(null, lines.map(function(b) { return b.y; }));
		const bottom = Math.max.apply(null, lines.map(function(b) { return b.y + b.height; }));
		return (top + bottom) / 2;
	}

	/* ------- Shared tonality / meter sync ------- */
	let tonalVisTranspose_s = 0;

	const MINOR_MODE_s = /^(m|min|minor|aeo|aeolian|dor|dorian|phr|phrygian|loc|locrian)$/;
	const COLL_PAIRS_s = {
		"major-stepwise": "minor-stepwise", "minor-stepwise": "major-stepwise",
		"major-I-V": "minor-i-V", "minor-i-V": "major-I-V"
	};

	function applyTonality_s() {
		if (!window.Tonality) return;
		var r = Tonality.getResting();
		if (r == null) return;
		var mode = Tonality.getMode();
		var wantMinor = !!(mode && MINOR_MODE_s.test(mode));
		var sel = document.getElementById("tonal-collection-selector");
		var switched = false;
		if (sel && COLL_PAIRS_s[sel.value]) {
			if (wantMinor !== /^minor/.test(sel.value)) {
				sel.value = COLL_PAIRS_s[sel.value];
				switched = true;
			}
		}
		tonalVisTranspose_s = r <= 6 ? r : r - 12;
		if (switched) {
			renderTonalBank_s();
			clearAll_s();
		} else {
			renderTonalBank_s();
			renderAll_s();
		}
	}

	function applyMeter_s() {
		var stored = null;
		try { stored = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("tuneMeter")); } catch(e) {}
		if (!stored) return;
		var n = stored.n, d = stored.d;
		var isTriple = (n === 3) || (n % 3 === 0 && d === 8);
		var wantFamily = isTriple ? "triple" : "duple";
		var sel = document.getElementById("rhythm-family-selector");
		if (!sel || sel.value === wantFamily) return;
		sel.value = wantFamily;
		refreshRhythmFamily_s();
	}

	/* ------- Song state ------- */
	let activeRhythmCells_s = [];
	let activeTonalCells_s = [];
	let phrases_s = [];
	let pendingExpansionIndex_s = null;
	let synthControl_s;
	const DEFAULT_EXPANSION_STRATEGY_s = "even";
	let undoStack_s = [];

	function snapshotBeforeChange_s() {
		undoStack_s.push(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(phrases_s)));
	}

	function undo_s() {
		if (undoStack_s.length === 0) return;
		phrases_s = undoStack_s.pop();
		pendingExpansionIndex_s = null;
		renderAll_s();
	}

	function phraseHits_s(phrase) {
		return phrase.rhythmCells.reduce(function(sum, c) { return sum + c.hits; }, 0);
	}

	function phrasePitches_s(phrase) {
		return phrase.tonalCells.reduce(function(all, c) { return all.concat(c.pitches); }, []);
	}

	function isPhraseResolved_s(phrase) {
		if (phrase.rhythmCells.length === 0 || phrase.tonalCells.length === 0) return false;
		const hits = phraseHits_s(phrase), notes = phrasePitches_s(phrase).length;
		if (hits === notes) return true;
		return hits > notes && !!phrase.expansion;
	}

	function currentOpenPhrase_s() {
		if (phrases_s.length === 0) return null;
		const last = phrases_s[phrases_s.length - 1];
		return isPhraseResolved_s(last) ? null : last;
	}

	function openPhraseForClick_s() {
		let phrase = currentOpenPhrase_s();
		if (!phrase) {
			phrase = { rhythmCells: [], tonalCells: [], expansion: null };
			phrases_s.push(phrase);
		}
		return phrase;
	}

	/* ------- Rhythm bank ------- */
	const TIME_SIGNATURES_s = {
		duple: ["2/4", "3/4", "4/4"],
		triple: ["6/8", "9/8", "12/8"]
	};

	function refreshTimeSignatureOptions_s() {
		const family = getActiveFamily_s();
		const selector = document.getElementById("time-signature-selector");
		selector.innerHTML = "";
		TIME_SIGNATURES_s[family].forEach(function(m) {
			const option = document.createElement("option");
			option.textContent = m;
			option.value = m;
			selector.appendChild(option);
		});
	}

	function setSelectedCriteria_s(criteria) {
		document.getElementById("crit-macrobeat").checked = criteria.macrobeat;
		document.getElementById("crit-microbeat").checked = criteria.microbeat;
		document.getElementById("crit-division").checked = criteria.division;
		document.getElementById("crit-elongation").checked = criteria.elongation;
		document.getElementById("crit-rest").checked = criteria.rest;
	}

	function criteriaChanged_s() { renderRhythmBank_s(); }

	function refreshRhythmFamily_s() {
		setSelectedCriteria_s(inferCriteriaFromCollectionName_s(getActiveFamily_s() === "triple" ? "Triple" : "Duple"));
		refreshTimeSignatureOptions_s();
		renderRhythmBank_s();
		clearAll_s();
	}

	function renderRhythmBank_s() {
		const family = getActiveFamily_s();
		const criteria = getSelectedCriteria_s();
		activeRhythmCells_s = getFilteredCells_s(family, criteria);
		const familyInfo = FAMILIES_s[family];

		const container = document.getElementById("rhythm-cell-buttons");
		container.innerHTML = "";

		const entries = [];
		activeRhythmCells_s.forEach(function(cell, i) {
			const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
			wrapper.className = "cell-wrapper";
			const numberLabel = document.createElement("span");
			numberLabel.className = "cell-number";
			numberLabel.textContent = String(i + 1);
			wrapper.appendChild(numberLabel);

			const button = document.createElement("button");
			button.type = "button";
			button.className = "cell-btn";
			button.setAttribute("aria-label", "Rhythm cell " + (i + 1) + ": " + cell.abc);
			button.addEventListener("click", function() { appendRhythmCell_s(i); });

			const preview = document.createElement("div");
			preview.className = "cell-preview";
			button.appendChild(preview);
			wrapper.appendChild(button);
			container.appendChild(wrapper);

			const abcString = "X:1\nM:none\nL:" + familyInfo.defaultL + "\nK:clef=none\n" + cell.abc;
			ABCJS.renderAbc(preview, abcString, { add_classes: true });

			const svg = preview.querySelector("svg");
			svg.style.transformOrigin = "0 0";
			const bbox = svg.getBBox();
			entries.push({ button: button, svg: svg, bbox: bbox });
		});

		if (entries.length === 0) return;
		const SPACING = 0.9;
		const maxScaledWidth = Math.max.apply(null, entries.map(function(e) { return e.bbox.width * SPACING; }));
		const buttonWidth = Math.ceil(maxScaledWidth) + 16;
		entries.forEach(function(entry) {
			entry.button.style.width = buttonWidth + "px";
			entry.button.style.height = "50px";
			const scaledLeft = entry.bbox.x * SPACING;
			const scaledWidth = entry.bbox.width * SPACING;
			const translateX = entry.button.clientWidth / 2 - (scaledLeft + scaledWidth / 2);
			const translateY = entry.button.clientHeight / 2 - (entry.bbox.y + entry.bbox.height / 2);
			entry.svg.style.transform = "translate(" + translateX + "px, " + translateY + "px) scale(" + SPACING + ", 1)";
		});
	}

	/* ------- Tonal bank ------- */
	function renderTonalBank_s() {
		const collectionName = document.getElementById("tonal-collection-selector").value;
		const key = getCollectionKeyField_s(collectionName);
		const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(patternObject[collectionName]);
		activeTonalCells_s = tuneBook.tunes.map(function(t) {
			const preview = extractV1Notes_s(t.abc, true);
			return { abc: extractV1Notes_s(t.abc, false), preview: preview, pitches: tokenizePitches_s(preview) };
		});

		const container = document.getElementById("tonal-cell-buttons");
		container.innerHTML = "";

		const entries = [];
		activeTonalCells_s.forEach(function(cell, i) {
			const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
			wrapper.className = "cell-wrapper";
			const numberLabel = document.createElement("span");
			numberLabel.className = "cell-number";
			numberLabel.textContent = indexToLetter_s(i);
			wrapper.appendChild(numberLabel);

			const button = document.createElement("button");
			button.type = "button";
			button.className = "cell-btn";
			button.setAttribute("aria-label", "Tonal cell " + indexToLetter_s(i) + ": " + cell.preview);
			button.addEventListener("click", function() { appendTonalCell_s(i); });

			const preview = document.createElement("div");
			preview.className = "cell-preview";
			button.appendChild(preview);
			wrapper.appendChild(button);
			container.appendChild(wrapper);

			const abcString = "X:1\nM:none\n%%staffwidth 100\nK:" + key + "\n" + cell.preview;
			ABCJS.renderAbc(preview, abcString, { add_classes: true, visualTranspose: tonalVisTranspose_s });

			const svg = preview.querySelector("svg");
			const bbox = svg.getBBox();
			const staffCenterY = getStaffCenter_s(svg, bbox);
			entries.push({ button: button, svg: svg, bbox: bbox, staffCenterY: staffCenterY });
		});

		if (entries.length === 0) return;
		const marginX = Math.max.apply(null, entries.map(function(e) { return e.bbox.width; })) * 0.1;
		const halfHeight = Math.max.apply(null, entries.map(function(e) {
			return Math.max(e.staffCenterY - e.bbox.y, (e.bbox.y + e.bbox.height) - e.staffCenterY);
		}));
		const contentHeight = halfHeight * 2;
		const marginY = contentHeight * 0.10;
		const totalHeight = contentHeight + marginY * 2;

		entries.forEach(function(entry) {
			entry.button.style.width = (entry.bbox.width + marginX * 2) + "px";
			entry.button.style.height = totalHeight + "px";
			entry.svg.style.transform =
				"translate(" + (-entry.bbox.x + marginX) + "px, " + (totalHeight / 2 - entry.staffCenterY) + "px)";
		});
	}

	/* ------- Appending & pairing ------- */
	function addSplitRhythm_s(phrase, split) {
		if (split.first) { phrase.rhythmCells.push(split.first); phrase.expansion = null; }
		if (split.rest) phrases_s.push({ rhythmCells: [split.rest], tonalCells: [], expansion: null });
	}

	function addSplitTonal_s(phrase, split) {
		if (split.first) { phrase.tonalCells.push(split.first); phrase.expansion = null; }
		if (split.rest) phrases_s.push({ rhythmCells: [], tonalCells: [split.rest], expansion: null });
	}

	function appendRhythmCell_s(index) {
		const cell = activeRhythmCells_s[index];
		const hits = hitCount_s(cell.abc);
		const phrase = openPhraseForClick_s();

		const segments = tokenizeRhythmCell_s(cell.abc);
		if (segments.length > 1) {
			const meter = getMeterInfo_s();
			const offset = pickupOffsetQuarters_s(meter.Lfraction, meter.barCapacity);
			const usedSoFar = (offset + phraseRhythmQuartersSoFar_s(phrase, meter.Lfraction)) % meter.barCapacity;
			const remainingQuarters = meter.barCapacity - usedSoFar;
			if (cellQuarters_s(cell.abc, meter.Lfraction) > remainingQuarters + 1e-9) return;
		}

		snapshotBeforeChange_s();

		if (phrase.tonalCells.length > 0) {
			const remaining = phrasePitches_s(phrase).length - phraseHits_s(phrase);
			if (hits > remaining) {
				if (phrase.rhythmCells.length > 0) {
					addSplitRhythm_s(phrase, splitRhythmCellByHits_s(cell.abc, remaining));
					renderAll_s();
					return;
				}
			}
		}

		phrase.rhythmCells.push({ abc: cell.abc, hits: hits });
		phrase.expansion = null;
		renderAll_s();
	}

	function appendTonalCell_s(index) {
		const cell = activeTonalCells_s[index];
		const phrase = openPhraseForClick_s();
		snapshotBeforeChange_s();

		if (phrase.rhythmCells.length > 0) {
			const rhythmHits = phraseHits_s(phrase);
			const newTotal = phrasePitches_s(phrase).length + cell.pitches.length;

			if (newTotal > rhythmHits) {
				const remaining = rhythmHits - phrasePitches_s(phrase).length;
				addSplitTonal_s(phrase, splitTonalCellByNotes_s(cell.abc, remaining));
				renderAll_s();
				return;
			}

			if (newTotal < rhythmHits && phrase.rhythmCells.length > 1) {
				phrase.tonalCells.push({ abc: cell.abc, pitches: cell.pitches });
				const trimmed = trimRhythmCellsToHits_s(phrase.rhythmCells, newTotal);
				phrase.rhythmCells = trimmed.kept;
				phrase.expansion = null;
				if (trimmed.leftover.length) phrases_s.push({ rhythmCells: trimmed.leftover, tonalCells: [], expansion: null });
				renderAll_s();
				return;
			}
		}

		phrase.tonalCells.push({ abc: cell.abc, pitches: cell.pitches });
		phrase.expansion = null;
		renderAll_s();
	}

	function clearAll_s() {
		if (phrases_s.length > 0) snapshotBeforeChange_s();
		phrases_s = [];
		pendingExpansionIndex_s = null;
		renderAll_s();
	}

	/* ------- Rendering ------- */
	function joinCells_s(cells) {
		if (cells.length === 0) return "";
		return cells.map(function(c) { return c.abc; }).join(" || ") + " ||";
	}

	function renderCuedFields_s() {
		const phrase = currentOpenPhrase_s();
		const rhythmCells = phrase ? phrase.rhythmCells : [];
		const tonalCells = phrase ? phrase.tonalCells : [];

		const meter = getMeterInfo_s();
		const rhythmHeader = "X:1\nM:" + meter.timeSignature + "\nL:" + meter.familyInfo.defaultL + "\nK:clef=none\n";
		const rhythmOffset = pickupOffsetQuarters_s(meter.Lfraction, meter.barCapacity);
		const rhythmBody = renderBarredWords_s(rhythmCells, null, rhythmOffset, meter.Lfraction, meter.barCapacity).join(" ");
		document.getElementById("cued-rhythm").value = rhythmBody ? rhythmHeader + rhythmBody : "";
		ABCJS.renderAbc("cued-rhythm-paper", rhythmHeader + rhythmBody, { add_classes: true });

		const tonalCollectionName = document.getElementById("tonal-collection-selector").value;
		const tonalKey = getCollectionKeyField_s(tonalCollectionName);
		const tonalHeader = "X:1\nM:none\nK:" + tonalKey + "\n";
		const tonalBody = joinCells_s(tonalCells);
		document.getElementById("cued-tonal").value = tonalBody ? tonalHeader + tonalBody : "";
		ABCJS.renderAbc("cued-tonal-paper", tonalHeader + tonalBody, { add_classes: true, visualTranspose: tonalVisTranspose_s });

		let rhythmNote = "", tonalNote = "";
		if (rhythmCells.length > 0 && tonalCells.length > 0) {
			const hits = phraseHits_s(phrase), notes = phrasePitches_s(phrase).length;
			if (hits < notes) {
				rhythmNote = "Needs " + (notes - hits) + " more note" + ((notes - hits) === 1 ? "" : "s") +
					" to match the tonal pattern — pick more rhythm.";
			} else if (hits > notes) {
				tonalNote = "Needs " + (hits - notes) + " more note" + ((hits - notes) === 1 ? "" : "s") +
					" to match the rhythm — pick more tonal patterns, or choose an expansion below.";
			}
		}
		document.getElementById("cued-rhythm-note").textContent = rhythmNote;
		document.getElementById("cued-tonal-note").textContent = tonalNote;
	}

	function renderPhraseRhythmWords_s(rhythmCells, pitches) {
		let p = 0;
		return rhythmCells.map(function(rc) {
			return tokenizeRhythmCell_s(rc.abc).map(function(seg) {
				if (seg.type === "note") return pitches[p++] + seg.suffix + seg.tie + seg.dotMark;
				return "z" + seg.suffix + seg.tie + seg.dotMark;
			}).join("");
		});
	}

	function renderExpansionPicker_s() {
		const picker = document.getElementById("expansion-picker");
		pendingExpansionIndex_s = null;
		for (let i = 0; i < phrases_s.length; i++) {
			const phrase = phrases_s[i];
			const hits = phraseHits_s(phrase), notes = phrasePitches_s(phrase).length;
			if (phrase.rhythmCells.length && phrase.tonalCells.length && hits > notes && !phrase.expansion) {
				pendingExpansionIndex_s = i;
				break;
			}
		}
		if (pendingExpansionIndex_s === null) {
			picker.classList.remove("visible");
			return;
		}
		picker.classList.add("visible");
		const index = pendingExpansionIndex_s;
		const phrase = phrases_s[index];
		const hits = phraseHits_s(phrase);
		const pitches = phrasePitches_s(phrase);
		document.getElementById("expansion-explainer").textContent =
			"Phrase " + (index + 1) + ": fitting " + pitches.length + " pitches into " + hits +
			" notes. Full notation is already previewing \"Spread evenly\" — press X, Y, or Z for a different one, or keep clicking tonal patterns.";

		const strategies = [["X", "front", "Repeat first"], ["Y", "even", "Spread evenly"], ["Z", "back", "Repeat last"]];
		const optionsContainer = document.getElementById("expansion-options");
		optionsContainer.innerHTML = "";
		const tonalKey = getCollectionKeyField_s(document.getElementById("tonal-collection-selector").value);
		strategies.forEach(function(s) {
			const key = s[0], strategy = s[1], label = s[2];
			const expanded = expandPitches_s(pitches, hits, strategy);
			const combined = renderPhraseRhythmWords_s(phrase.rhythmCells, expanded).join(" ");

			const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
			wrapper.className = "expansion-option";
			const keyLabel = document.createElement("div");
			keyLabel.className = "expansion-key";
			keyLabel.textContent = key + " — " + label + (strategy === DEFAULT_EXPANSION_STRATEGY_s ? " (default)" : "");
			wrapper.appendChild(keyLabel);

			const preview = document.createElement("div");
			preview.style.width = "140px";
			preview.style.height = "60px";
			wrapper.appendChild(preview);

			const button = document.createElement("button");
			button.type = "button";
			button.className = "sq-btn";
			button.textContent = "Choose " + key;
			button.addEventListener("click", function() { resolveExpansion_s(index, strategy); });
			wrapper.appendChild(button);

			optionsContainer.appendChild(wrapper);
			ABCJS.renderAbc(preview, "X:1\nM:none\n%%staffwidth 80\nK:" + tonalKey + "\n" + combined, { add_classes: true, visualTranspose: tonalVisTranspose_s });
		});
	}

	function resolveExpansion_s(index, strategy) {
		snapshotBeforeChange_s();
		phrases_s[index].expansion = strategy;
		renderAll_s();
	}

	function renderFullNotation_s() {
		const tonalCollectionName = document.getElementById("tonal-collection-selector").value;
		const tonalKey = getCollectionKeyField_s(tonalCollectionName);
		const meter = getMeterInfo_s();
		const { Lfraction, timeSignature, barCapacity, familyInfo } = meter;

		const outputWords = [];
		let runningOffset = 0;

		for (let i = 0; i < phrases_s.length; i++) {
			const phrase = phrases_s[i];
			if (phrase.rhythmCells.length === 0 || phrase.tonalCells.length === 0) break;

			const hits = phraseHits_s(phrase);
			const pitches = phrasePitches_s(phrase);
			let resolvedPitches;
			if (hits === pitches.length) {
				resolvedPitches = pitches;
			} else if (hits > pitches.length) {
				resolvedPitches = expandPitches_s(pitches, hits, phrase.expansion || DEFAULT_EXPANSION_STRATEGY_s);
			} else {
				break;
			}

			const words = renderBarredWords_s(phrase.rhythmCells, resolvedPitches, runningOffset, Lfraction, barCapacity);
			outputWords.push.apply(outputWords, words);
			runningOffset = (runningOffset + phraseRhythmQuartersSoFar_s(phrase, Lfraction)) % barCapacity;
		}

		const body = outputWords.join(" ");
		const abcString = "X:1\n%%MIDI program 4 \nM:" + timeSignature + "\nL:" + familyInfo.defaultL +
			"\nK:" + tonalKey + "\n" + body;
		document.getElementById("full-notation").value = body ? abcString : "";
		renderFullPaper_s(body ? abcString : "X:1\nM:" + timeSignature + "\nK:" + tonalKey + "\n");
	}

	function renderFullPaper_s(abcString) {
		const visualObj = ABCJS.renderAbc("full-paper", abcString, { add_classes: true, visualTranspose: tonalVisTranspose_s })[0];
		new ABCJS.synth.CreateSynth().init({
			visualObj: visualObj,
			options: { soundFontUrl: "https://paulrosen.github.io/midi-js-soundfonts/MusyngKite/" }
		}).then(function() {
			if (synthControl_s) {
				synthControl_s.setTune(visualObj, true).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
			}
		}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
	}

	function renderAll_s() {
		renderCuedFields_s();
		renderExpansionPicker_s();
		renderFullNotation_s();
	}

	let editTimeout_s;
	function editFullNotation_s() {
		clearTimeout(editTimeout_s);
		editTimeout_s = setTimeout(function() {
			renderFullPaper_s(document.getElementById("full-notation").value);
		}, 400);
	}

	function load_s() {
		const tonalSelector = document.getElementById("tonal-collection-selector");
		for (const key in patternObject) {
			const option = document.createElement("option");
			option.textContent = key;
			option.value = key;
			tonalSelector.appendChild(option);
		}

		const S_CFG = window.TOOL_CONFIG || {};
		if (S_CFG.tonalCollections && S_CFG.tonalCollections.length)
			Array.from(tonalSelector.options).forEach(function(o) { if (S_CFG.tonalCollections.indexOf(o.value) === -1) o.remove(); });
		if (S_CFG.lockTonalCollections || tonalSelector.options.length <= 1)
			(tonalSelector.closest('.sq-group') || tonalSelector).style.display = 'none';
		if (S_CFG.rhythmFamily) document.getElementById('rhythm-family-selector').value = S_CFG.rhythmFamily;
		if (S_CFG.lockRhythmFamily)
			(document.getElementById('rhythm-family-selector').closest('.sq-group') || document.getElementById('rhythm-family-selector')).style.display = 'none';
		if (S_CFG.lockTimeSignature)
			(document.getElementById('time-signature-selector').closest('.sq-group') || document.getElementById('time-signature-selector')).style.display = 'none';
		if (S_CFG.lockCriteria)
			document.querySelectorAll('#songs-root .cell-criteria input[type=checkbox]').forEach(function(cb) { cb.disabled = true; });

		if (ABCJS.synth.supportsAudio()) {
			synthControl_s = new ABCJS.synth.SynthController();
			synthControl_s.load("#audio-s", null, {
				displayRestart: true, displayPlay: true, displayProgress: true
			});
		} else {
			document.querySelector("#audio-s").innerHTML =
				"<div class='audio-error'>Audio is not supported in this browser.</div>";
		}

		refreshRhythmFamily_s();
		renderTonalBank_s();
		renderAll_s();

		if (window.Tonality) {
			Tonality.onChange(function(st, src) { if (src !== "local") applyTonality_s(); });
			applyTonality_s();
		}
		applyMeter_s();
		window.addEventListener("storage", function(e) { if (e.key === "tuneMeter") applyMeter_s(); });

		document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
			const active = document.activeElement;
			const isTyping = active && (active.tagName === "TEXTAREA" || (active.tagName === "INPUT" && active.type !== "checkbox" && active.type !== "radio"));
			if (isTyping) return;
			if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey || e.altKey) return;

			const key = e.key.toUpperCase();

			if (key === "U") { undo_s(); return; }

			if (pendingExpansionIndex_s !== null) {
				if (key === "X") { resolveExpansion_s(pendingExpansionIndex_s, "front"); return; }
				if (key === "Y") { resolveExpansion_s(pendingExpansionIndex_s, "even"); return; }
				if (key === "Z") { resolveExpansion_s(pendingExpansionIndex_s, "back"); return; }
			}

			const number = parseInt(e.key, 10);
			if (!isNaN(number) && number >= 1 && number <= activeRhythmCells_s.length) {
				appendRhythmCell_s(number - 1);
				return;
			}

			const letterIndex = e.key.length === 1 ? key.charCodeAt(0) - 65 : -1;
			if (letterIndex >= 0 && letterIndex < activeTonalCells_s.length) {
				appendTonalCell_s(letterIndex);
			}
		});
	}
</script>

<div id="songs-root">

	<!-- Full notation (output) -->
	<div class="sq-card">
		<h2>Full notation</h2>
		<div id="full-paper" class="sq-paper"></div>
		<textarea id="full-notation" spellcheck="false" oninput="editFullNotation_s()"></textarea>
		<div class="expansion-picker" id="expansion-picker">
			<p id="expansion-explainer"></p>
			<div class="expansion-options" id="expansion-options"></div>
		</div>
		<div class="sq-row" style="margin-top:.25rem">
			<div id="audio-s"></div>
			<button type="button" class="sq-btn" onclick="undo_s()">Undo (u)</button>
			<button type="button" class="sq-btn" onclick="clearAll_s()">Clear All</button>
		</div>
	</div>

	<!-- Rhythm input -->
	<div class="sq-card">
		<h2>Rhythm</h2>
		<div id="cued-rhythm-paper" class="sq-paper"></div>
		<textarea id="cued-rhythm" spellcheck="false" readonly></textarea>
		<div class="cue-note" id="cued-rhythm-note"></div>
		<div class="sq-row" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">
			<div class="sq-group">
				<span class="sq-label">Meter</span>
				<select id="rhythm-family-selector" onchange="refreshRhythmFamily_s()">
					<option value="duple">Duple</option>
					<option value="triple">Triple</option>
				</select>
			</div>
			<div class="sq-group">
				<span class="sq-label">Time signature</span>
				<select id="time-signature-selector" onchange="renderRhythmBank_s(); renderAll_s();"></select>
			</div>
			<div class="cell-criteria">
				<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-macrobeat" onchange="criteriaChanged_s()"> Macrobeat</label>
				<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-microbeat" onchange="criteriaChanged_s()"> Microbeat</label>
				<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-division" onchange="criteriaChanged_s()"> Division</label>
				<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-elongation" onchange="criteriaChanged_s()"> Elongation</label>
				<label><input type="checkbox" id="crit-rest" onchange="criteriaChanged_s()"> Rest</label>
			</div>
		</div>
		<div class="cell-bank">
			<div class="cell-buttons" id="rhythm-cell-buttons"></div>
		</div>
	</div>

	<!-- Tonal input -->
	<div class="sq-card">
		<h2>Tonal</h2>
		<div id="cued-tonal-paper" class="sq-paper"></div>
		<textarea id="cued-tonal" spellcheck="false" readonly></textarea>
		<div class="cue-note" id="cued-tonal-note"></div>
		<div class="sq-row" style="margin-bottom:.6rem">
			<div class="sq-group">
				<span class="sq-label">Collection</span>
				<select id="tonal-collection-selector" onchange="renderTonalBank_s(); clearAll_s();"></select>
			</div>
		</div>
		<div class="cell-bank">
			<div class="cell-buttons" id="tonal-cell-buttons"></div>
		</div>
	</div>

</div>

<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/patterns/pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/shared/tonality.js?v=4"></script>
<script>
	load_s();
</script>
```
